column1: # AWS RDS DB instance-class catalogue — instance capacity source for synthkit RDS construct.
# Enumerated: aws rds describe-orderable-db-instance-options --engine postgres --region eu-west-1
#             (both engines return the same class list; deduplicated union used here)
#              vCPU/memoryGiB confirmed against EC2 family specs (same underlying hardware).
#              NVMe-d/-id/-idn/-in variants share CPU+RAM with their base class; same figures used.
# burstableBaselinePct: per-vCPU baseline CPU % for t-family burstable instances.
#   t3 and t4g share the same baseline schedule.
# --- General Purpose: db.m5d (NVMe-SSD local storage; same CPU/RAM as m5) ---
# --- General Purpose: db.m6gd (NVMe-SSD; same CPU/RAM as m6g) ---
# --- General Purpose: db.m6i (3rd Gen Intel Xeon Scalable
# --- General Purpose: db.m6id (NVMe-SSD; same CPU/RAM as m6i) ---
# --- General Purpose: db.m6idn (NVMe-SSD + enhanced networking; same CPU/RAM as m6i) ---
# --- General Purpose: db.m6in (enhanced networking; same CPU/RAM as m6i) ---
# --- General Purpose: db.m7i (4th Gen Intel Xeon Scalable
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r5d (NVMe-SSD; same CPU/RAM as r5) ---
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r6gd (NVMe-SSD; same CPU/RAM as r6g) ---
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r6i (3rd Gen Intel Xeon Scalable
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r6id (NVMe-SSD; same CPU/RAM as r6i) ---
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r6idn (NVMe-SSD + enhanced networking; same CPU/RAM as r6i) ---
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r6in (enhanced networking; same CPU/RAM as r6i) ---
# --- Memory Optimized: db.r7i (4th Gen Intel Xeon Scalable
# --- Extra Memory: db.x2idn (Intel Ice Lake NVMe; 32 GiB/vCPU) ---
# --- Extra Memory: db.x2iedn (Intel Ice Lake NVMe enhanced; 32 GiB/vCPU) ---
